name.description: Opportunity name (REQUIRED). E.g., 'Q1 2026 Solar Deal', 'Enterprise Software License'.

closeDate.description: Expected close date (REQUIRED). Format: YYYY-MM-DD. E.g., '2026-03-31'.

stageName.description: Sales stage (REQUIRED): 'Prospecting', 'Qualification', 'Needs Analysis', 'Value Proposition', 'Proposal/Price Quote', 'Negotiation/Review', 'Closed Won', 'Closed Lost'.

accountId.description: Account ID from find_Account_by_Name (primaryAccountId). Use this if available.

amount.description: Deal value in USD. E.g., 100000 for $100K deal.

probability.description: Win probability percentage (0-100). E.g., 75 for 75% likely to close.

description.description: Detailed description of the deal, requirements, or notes.

nextStep.description: Next action to move deal forward. E.g., 'Schedule demo', 'Send proposal', 'Follow up call'.
